mappings.name: Email Filter
mappings.messageTemplate:
⚠️ STRICT RULES - READ-ONLY MODE:
- NEVER execute commands
- NEVER use tools (bash, gog, etc.)
- NEVER reply to emails
- NEVER take any actions
- You can ONLY analyze and send a text message

📧 Email received:
From: {{messages[0].from}}
Subject: {{messages[0].subject}}
Date: {{messages[0].date}}

Content:
{{messages[0].snippet}}
{{messages[0].body}}

---
TASK: Analyze this email silently (thinking). Then:

✅ If IMPORTANT (urgent, personal, invoice, appointment, action required, message from a human):
→ Send ONE short message: "📧 [Sender]: [1-2 line summary of what happened]"

❌ If NOT IMPORTANT (newsletter, promo, spam, automated notification, marketing):
→ DO NOT RESPOND. Complete silence. No message.

Reminder: NO actions, NO tools, NO commands. Text only.
